guidance_detail: Permian on track to 1.8M boe/d in 2026 (value over volume); Golden Pass LNG Train 1 first LNG (Mar), Trains 2/3 by end-2026/Q2 2027; upstream +8% YoY ex-disruptions.
risk_factors: Qatar LNG train damage: 3-5 year repair (~3% of global production)
Ongoing Middle East conflict; 'market has not seen the full impact'
Geopolitical/weather disruptions (Kazakhstan drone attacks, Permian winter storm)
